chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, MIRPURKHAS C.P No.D-606 of 2025. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A No.2411/25. 2. For orders on office objections. 3. For orders on M.A No.2412/25. 4. For hearing of main case. 01.10.2025. Mir Tarique Khan Talpur, Advocate for Petitioner. 1. Urgency granted. 2. To be complied with within a week’s time. 3. Granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 4. Counsel for Petitioners submits that he would be satisfied, if the Application / request earlier moved by Petitioner to Respondent No.8 (Town Chairman, Mir Sher Muhammad Khan Talpur, Mirpurkhas) is decided within a stipulated time. Learned A.A.G present in Court in other matters waives notice of this Petition and submits that whatever directions would be issued, same will be complied with in letter and spirit. In view of the above, instant Petition stands disposed of with directions to Respondent No.8 to decide the Application dated 13.03.2025 earlier moved by Petitioner No.2 within two weeks under intimation to this Court. Office to send a copy of this order to Respondent No.8. JUDGE JUDGE Ali.
